title: SV: function declared after its call leads to internal error (IVL_UVM reduced test)
code_blocks:
iverilog -DVW_IVLOG_GO2UVM -DIVL_UVM -g2012 -I../ -o vw_ivl_go2uvm.vvp  -f flist.class 2>&1 | tee go2uvm_comp.log 	
../ivl_uvm_sf.sv:14: internal error: Can't find task uvm_info_counter in class uvm_component
../ivl_uvm_sf.sv:14: error: Enable of unknown task ``uvm_info_counter''.
../ivl_uvm_sf.sv:14: error: Unable to elaborate statement in function end_of_elaboration_phase.
